title: PCB Export Agent
description: Produces Gerbers, drill files, BOM, pick-and-place, IPC-356 netlist, STEP 3D model, and fab package. Organizes outputs into a dated release folder.
context: Uses kicad-manufacturing-export skill. Output directory: /workspace/pcb/fab/<project>_<date>/. Verify each export file is non-empty before reporting success.
